Yeah, that was I ment too. Rest of the week is written more as risk-on is increasing day by day. 
Naturally I know that one should adopt during the day. 
But I'm more of a swing trader so the weekly is more important to me. 
But right now I have added some shorts through warrants from just shy of 7k and days like today, I get a call and make money intraday. 
But I can't wait until one can swing trade more
